mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: Solution treatment at 1100°C (instead of 1050°C) on Al-series steels results in a slight decrease in yield strength, attributed to grain coarsening. mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: κ-carbide precipitation mechanism: spinodal decomposition and ordering of C and Al in austenite. κ-carbides exhibit a coherent interface with austenite and are sheared by dislocations during deformation (shear mechanism), consistent with particle shear model σ_shear = α f^(1/2) d_Car^(1/2).
